welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 120,000 Wyndham Rewards points: 90,000 points after spending $6,000 in the first 120 days, plus 30,000 points after spending $750 on Hotels by Wyndham in the first 180 days.
notes: Premier offer corroborated by Wyndham/Barclays search-visible sources and secondary coverage; do not use the Earner Business official page as the Premier source.
Estimated value intentionally conservative because Wyndham adds a new 45,000-point top redemption tier on 2026-09-15.

open_questions: Replace search-visible/secondary Premier sources with a dedicated official Barclays Premier URL once Barclays publishes a stable Premier product page.

community.summary: Resolved: Wyndham Earner Premier is a distinct new premium card, not Earner Business/Plus. It needs a dedicated production card.

observations.excerpt: Issuer/Wyndham pages should determine whether the 120k offer belongs to Earner Premier or Earner Business and what annual fee applies.
